original_snippet_context: Financial operations of the Federal Treasury.
relevant_quote: O Thesouro Federal resgatou hontem mais 17 apólices do empréstimo de 1898
justification: This snippet describes a financial operation of the Federal Treasury (redemption of bonds from 1898).  While related to government finance, there's no explicit or implicit mention of monetary policy, currency conversion, or any position related to the "Caixa de Conversão."
